description: single-objective optimization with a Genetic Algorithm on a benchmark problem (read-only)
rules: read-only — computes a result and writes a report; mutates nothing remote or live
runs the vendored single_objective_example.py core via python3
forces MPLBACKEND=Agg so plotting never blocks
captures stdout (best solution, objective, n_gen, n_eval) to record_store/single_objective.txt
requires the pymoo package at run time; degrades to an empty {} report if it is absent
usage: Set PROBLEM (e.g. sphere), N_VAR, POP_SIZE, N_GEN. Output: single_objective.txt.
limitation: The vendored core runs its built-in benchmark (sphere, GA); vars document intent. Needs the pymoo library installed to produce real results.
